summary: Grey Out Past Services feature VERIFIED WORKING. The implementation in EventsResults.jsx and TravelResults.jsx is functioning correctly. Past events show 'Past Event' badges with 'Ended' buttons and grayscale styling. Past travel routes show 'Departed' badges with 'Unavailable' buttons and grayscale styling. Click blocking is working - clicking on past items does NOT navigate to booking pages.

issues: Mixed Content warnings - notifications API using HTTP instead of HTTPS (non-blocking)

events_grey_out_grid_view.test: Past events should be greyed out with 'Past Event' badge and 'Ended' button in Grid View
events_grey_out_grid_view.details: Found 5 'Past Event' badges, 5 'Ended' buttons, 0 'Get Tickets' buttons. Grayscale styling applied.

events_grey_out_list_view.test: Past events should be greyed out with 'Past Event' badge and 'Ended' button in List View
events_grey_out_list_view.details: Found 5 'Past Event' badges, 5 'Ended' buttons in list view. 'Available: Ended' text shown.

events_click_blocking.test: Clicking past events should NOT navigate to booking
events_click_blocking.details: URL remained on results page after clicking 'Ended' button and event card. No navigation to booking page.

travel_grey_out_grid_view.test: Past departure routes should be greyed out with 'Departed' badge and 'Unavailable' button
travel_grey_out_grid_view.details: Found 'Departed' badge, 'Unavailable' button, 'No longer available' text. Grayscale styling applied.

travel_click_blocking.test: Clicking past routes should NOT navigate to booking
travel_click_blocking.details: isPast() check in handleTripSelect prevents navigation for past trips.

future_events_display.test: Future events should display normally with full colors and 'Get Tickets' button
future_events_display.details: All MOCK_EVENTS have 2025 dates which are past relative to server time (Feb 2026). Need future events in database to test.

critical_code_review_comments: isPast() function correctly implemented in dateUtils.js
EventsResults.jsx correctly uses isPast(event.date, event.time) for both EventCardGrid and EventCardList
TravelResults.jsx correctly uses isPast(tripDate, trip.departure_time) for both TripCardGrid and TripCardList
handleBook() in EventsResults.jsx has isPast() check to prevent booking past events
handleTripSelect() in TravelResults.jsx has isPast() check to prevent booking past trips
Grayscale filter and opacity styling correctly applied via inline styles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grey-out feature is fully implemented and working. EventsResults.jsx and TravelResults.jsx both have isPast() checks with proper styling (opacity: 0.5, grayscale filter), badges ('Past Event'/'Departed'), and disabled buttons ('Ended'/'Unavailable'). Click blocking is working via isPast() checks in handleBook() and handleTripSelect() functions. MOCK_EVENTS in EventsResults.jsx have 2025 dates which are all past. To test future events display, need events with dates after Feb 2026.
